title: Selling Music Online and Accepting Bitcoin: What It Actually Is and How It Works — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Imagine you're a musician from Venezuela, trying to sell your beats online, but PayPal has blocked your account due to geo-restrictions. You're not alone. Many creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and other countries face similar challenges when trying to sell digital products, like ebooks or software, without relying on PayPal or Stripe. But what if you could sell your music online, accept Bitcoin, and get paid instantly, without any restrictions? That's exactly what we'll explore in this breakdown.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling digital products online, like music, ebooks, or software, without relying on PayPal or Stripe, is a common challenge for creators in restricted countries. But it's not just about finding a workaround; it's about tapping into a global market and getting paid in your preferred cryptocurrency. This setup allows you to sell your products directly to buyers, without intermediaries, and receive payment in Bitcoin or other cryptocurrencies, which can then be converted to USD or other fiat currencies.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind this setup involves using a blockchain-based payment processor, like NOWPayments, which supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT. This allows buyers to pay for your digital products using their preferred cryptocurrency. The Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration, makes it easy for buyers to pay using their own wallets, without creating an account or going through a lengthy verification process.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This setup is perfect for digital creators who face restrictions on using traditional payment processors like PayPal or Stripe. It's ideal for musicians, authors, software developers, and designers who want to sell their digital products globally, without worrying about geo-restrictions or verification requirements. With this setup, you can focus on creating and selling your digital products, while we handle the payment processing and delivery.
Selling digital products online without relying on PayPal or Stripe is a viable option for creators in restricted countries.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The key components that make this setup work together are the blockchain-based payment processor, the Web3 Wallet Connect, and the backend infrastructure that automates delivery and payment verification. The payment processor handles the cryptocurrency transactions, while the Web3 Wallet Connect makes it easy for buyers to pay using their own wallets. The backend infrastructure ensures that your digital products are delivered instantly to buyers, along with a PDF receipt, without requiring any manual intervention.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know how to sell your digital products online, accept Bitcoin, and get paid instantly, it's time to take action. Start by setting up your own digital store using the Unchained Commerce Shop, which can be found at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. Next, integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect to enable buyers to pay using their preferred cryptocurrency. Finally, start creating and selling your digital products, and watch your sales grow as you tap into a global market.

Your Action Checklist

To start selling your digital products online and accepting Bitcoin, follow these steps: Set up your digital store using the Unchained Commerce Shop; Integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect to enable buyers to pay using their preferred cryptocurrency; Create and upload your digital products to your store; Test your payment processing and delivery setup; Start promoting your store and products to attract buyers.
